历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for this subject category fluctuated significantly: approximately 4762 → 2638 → 6993 → 13365 → 4935. From 2021 to 2024, it first decreased, then increased, then decreased again, and in 2025 it rebounded to 4935. In the recent three years (2023–2025), the ranking fluctuated between 4935 and 6993. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 4935. The provincial enrollment plan for this category was 3 students in 2021 and 2 students each year from 2022 to 2025. The 2026 plan is 2 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class University. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with a stable ranking between 73rd and 82nd in recent years, making it a top-tier language university. In 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (the admission rankings for minor language majors dropped significantly). In 2026, its reputation remains somewhat negative (involving a scandal of a postgraduate entrance exam teacher fabricating academic credentials). Its Douyin popularity ranks 39th overall (relatively hot), and it reached high popularity in 2024. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly relevant to the university's English and other admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see,' overall stable but slightly cool. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in this province is approximately 154,000 (an increase of about 32% from approximately 116,360 in 2025). Based on historical proportions, the Physics Category is estimated to have about 110,800 examinees (compared to 83,716 in 2025), indicating a significant increase in the candidate pool and intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolian examinees. With only 2 students admitted in the Physics Category, it is a very small-scale enrollment, making rankings highly susceptible to fluctuations due to individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4935, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase of approximately 32% in the number of Physics Category examinees in this province, the substantial increase in candidates will markedly intensify competition. The minimum ranking is expected to rise slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4985, with a range of 4485–5485.

Rankings within the predicted range (4485–5485) are all worth considering. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4485), candidates can focus on applying for the English Joint Training major. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5485), candidates should apply with caution.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for this subject category was approximately 108 → 724 → 2184 → 5426 → 1102, showing a continuous backward trend from 2021 to 2024 (moving from 108 to 5426), with a sharp rebound to 1102 in 2025, indicating significant volatility; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1102; the provincial enrollment plan for this category was 1 person in 2021, 4 persons each year from 2022 to 2024, and 7 persons in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 persons, a reduction of 1 person compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 14.3%, theoretically slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings between 73 and 82 in recent years, belonging to the top language universities; reputation in 2023 was somewhat negative (significant decline in admission rankings for minor language majors); reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative (involving rumors of academic fraud by a postgraduate entrance exam teacher); Douyin popularity overall ranking 39th (relatively hot), reached high heat in 2024 (12th), overall attention is moderately high; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly related to the university's language admission majors, providing strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see', with overall popularity stable but slightly cold; the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 154,000 (an increase of about 32% from about 116,360 in 2025), with an estimated history category of about 43,200 (32,644 in 2025), a significant increase in the number of candidates, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolia candidates; the university enrolls a small number of students in Inner Mongolia (7 in history category and 2 in physics category in 2025), making it a small-scale enrollment, and rankings are easily affected by individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1102, a reduction in enrollment of about 14.3% (easing competition), a significant increase of about 32% in the number of history category candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and a somewhat negative reputation, the easing effect of enrollment reduction is offset by the significant increase in candidates, leading to slightly intensified competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1038, with a range of 851–1225.
